articles.title: Facing a crisis, Bitcoin treasury companies need to pivot to survive
articles.description: Here, Wellener offers tactics that firms must use to prove they’re more than just a crypto play.

articles.title: Strategy’s latest massive bitcoin purchase offers insight into its evolving funding model
articles.description: A $1.18 billion preferred stock raise, roughly equivalent to 16,800 BTC, signals a shift away from common stock as dividend obligations top $1 billion.

articles.title: Popular Solana wallet Phantom wins CFTC nod to access regulated derivatives markets
articles.description: This means Phantom can act as a non-custodial interface connecting users to registered derivatives platforms, removing the need for broker registration under specific conditions.

articles.title: Sam Altman's World teams up with Coinbase to prove there is a real person behind every AI transaction
articles.description: World said some estimates suggest agentic commerce could reach $3 trillion to $5 trillion by 2030, with agents accounting for up to 25% of U.S. e-commerce.

articles.title: Vietnam pushes local crypto exchanges as Hanoi moves to block offshore trading: Reuters
articles.description: The move aims to regulate the country's growing crypto market and restrict trading on foreign platforms.
